ddls:
CREATE TABLE "gene_expression" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression record */,
  "GI_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of GI gene */,
  "LHY_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of LHY gene */,
  "Light_P" INTEGER /* Light condition parameter */,
  "PRR5_NI_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of PRR5_NI gene */,
  "PRR7_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of PRR7 gene */,
  "PRR9_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of PRR9 gene */,
  "TOC1_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of TOC1 gene */,
  "Y_mRNA" REAL /* Expression level of Y gene */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "plant_id" TEXT /* ID of the plant sample */,
  "time_point" TEXT /* Time at which the expression was measured */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for measuring gene expression */,
  "quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_Light_P FOREIGN KEY ("Light_P") REFERENCES light_conditions ("light_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene's function */,
  "chromosome_location" TEXT /* Location of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_function" TEXT /* Detailed function of the gene */,
  "references" TEXT /* Relevant scientific references or publications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "light_conditions" (
  "light_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each light condition */,
  "light_condition" TEXT /* Name of the light condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the light condition */,
  "intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the light */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the light exposure */,
  "spectrum" TEXT /* Spectrum of the light */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("light_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User's permissions in more detail (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expression record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, analyze) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for access */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user's session */,
  "log_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expression_id FOREIGN KEY ("expression_id") REFERENCES gene_expression ("expression_id")
)
